description: Black and orange backpack with branding in the front, has an elasticated loop on the frontA padded haul loop at the top and one padded and adjustable single shoulder strap with branding and mesh on the inner side for comfort and better ventilation, straps with insert buckle closure at the shoulder strap and sides to secure it at the waistOne main compartment with a padded laptop sleeve secured by a strap with Velcro closure, two pouches for stowing away essentialsOne zipped compartment and two small zipped pockets on the front
